blockReason: Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 91). defects: No candidate-facing hook emphasis: headline font size is good but lacks visual emphasis relative to body text for mobile scrolls.
Contact info area could be visually separated more to stand out better from the informational block above.
Bottom informational block feels a bit cramped; some spacing improvement around interview date buttons and salary/benefits box would improve clarity.

requiredCorrections.note: Make the main headline visually more prominent and candidate-attractive, for example larger font size or heavier weight, to ensure strong immediate candidate hook.
Add more vertical space between sections, especially around the interview date buttons and the salary/benefits callout to reduce crowding and improve readability.
Enhance contact info block’s visual distinction, maybe by adding a subtle border or background shade, to make contact details easier to find at a glance.
